task: Plot geometries from KML/KMZ on an interactive map

output.description: Interactive HTML map with Leaflet showing all geometries

steps.name: parse_geometry
steps.description: Read KML/KMZ, extract all geometries as GeoJSON. For KMZ, unzip first to get the KML inside.

steps.name: generate_map
steps.description: Create a self-contained HTML file with Leaflet.js that displays all geometries on an OpenStreetMap basemap. Color polygons, lines, points differently. Auto-fit map bounds. Add popups with properties.
